session.user:
Run prettier check on these three files and report results: - docs/learned/planning/cross-artifact-analysis.md - docs/learned/planning/lifecycle.md - docs/learned/planning/tripwires.md
Command: npx prettier --check docs/learned/planning/cross-artifact-analysis.md docs/learned/planning/lifecycle.md docs/learned/planning/tripwires.md
session.assistant: I'll run the prettier check on those three files.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check prettier formatting on three planning docs

session.tool_result: Checking formatting... All matched files use Prettier code style!
session.assistant:
prettier passed: All three files conform to Prettier code style
**Files checked:** - docs/learned/planning/cross-artifact-analysis.md - docs/learned/planning/lifecycle.md - docs/learned/planning/tripwires.md
All files are properly formatted.
